description_long: This is a modern, angular backpack with a structured silhouette and a predominantly blue body. The front features a large, flat pocket with geometric paneling and subtle contour lines, while the sides have additional, slightly protruding pockets. The back is equipped with two wide, black, polygonal shoulder straps and a sturdy top handle for carrying. The material appears to be a durable synthetic fabric, likely nylon or polyester, with a matte finish and minimal surface texture. There are no visible logos, decorative elements, or zippers, giving the backpack a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for daily urban use.
description: A blue, angular backpack with black polygonal straps, geometric paneling, and a minimalist, utilitarian design. No visible logos, zippers, or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main blue compartment with a large, flat front pocket and angular side pockets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the backpack and the protruding side pocket, as well as the black strap profile.
description_view_2: Back view displays the two wide, black, polygonal shoulder straps and the top handle, with the main blue body visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side pocket and strap profile.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, black, polygonal shoulder straps with a top handle; straps appear to be padded and adjustable.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One large main compartment, one large flat front pocket, and two side pockets; all pockets are external and visible.
